instruction:
A professor of statistics refutes the claim that the average student spends 3 hours studying for a midterm exam. Which hypothesis is used to test the claim? [ANS] A. $H_0: \mu=3, H_1: \mu 
ot=3$  B. $H_0: \mu=3, H_1: \mu < 3$  C. $H_0: \mu 
ot=3, H_1: \mu=3$  D. $H_0: \mu 
ot=3, H_1: \mu > 3$
Suppose that we reject a null hypothesis at the 0.05 level of significance. Then for which of the following $\alpha-$ values do we also reject the null hypothesis? [ANS] A. 0.02  B. 0.04  C. 0.06  D. 0.03
